android.title: Update available
android.message: Balyria 1.0.2 is available with important fixes and improvements.
android.trustMessage: Your local finance data stays protected on this device.
android.helperText: Open Google Play to install the latest version when the Update button appears.
android.footerText: Updates keep your planner accurate, secure, and easier to use.
